name: Malate Bayview Mansion City View and Seaview - Apartment
about: Malate Bayview Mansion City View and Seaview features accommodations in Manila near Manila Bay Beach and Rizal Park. The property is around 1.8 miles from World Trade Center Metro Manila, 1.9 miles from Intramuros, and 2.2 miles from Fort Santiago. T... This apartment is consisted of of 1 living room, 1 separate bedroom and 1 bathroom with a bath and free toiletries. Meals can be prepared in the kitchen, which is fitted with a refrigerator, kitchenware, a microwave and an electric kettle. Featuring a terrace with sea views, this apartment also offers air conditioning and a flat-screen TV. The unit offers 2 beds.
